description: Hebrew-substrate anchor lens. Pivots English 'life' onto חַיִּים's logos.vitality.animate atom via the he cognition pack's field hook. Renders surface as English compound 'covenant-life'. Dual-correction pair with grc_zoe_v1: same domain atom (logos.vitality.animate), different substrate and cognitive mode — Hebrew chayyim is plural living-ness, communal and covenantal; Greek zoe is singular animate vitality. Atom confirmed in he_core_cognition_v1 lexicon (he-core-cog-004). See ADR-0073c.
